nasb.text: She took the pan and dished them out before him, but he refused to eat. And Amnon said, “Have everyone go out from me.” So everyone went out from him.

esv.text: And she took the pan and emptied it out before him, but he refused to eat. And Amnon said, “Send out everyone from me.” So everyone went out from him.

cnv.text: 她拿過鍋來，在他面前把餅倒出來，暗嫩卻不肯吃，他說：“叫眾人離開我出去！”眾人就都離開他出去了。

ccb.text: 她拿着锅在他面前把饼倒出来，但暗嫩却不肯吃。暗嫩命令仆人：“你们全都出去吧！”仆人就都退下了。
